name: shipeasy
description: Shipeasy — SDK install, auth, project bind, plus every feature module (experiments + metrics, gates + configs + kill switches, translations, in-app feedback) in a single plugin. Slash commands are nested under /shipeasy:<noun>:<verb> with plural nouns (flags, configs, ks, experiments, metrics, bugs, i18n); skills are named after the feature area (setup, experiments, metrics, flags, i18n, bugs).
